action_set_definitions.name: get_comprehensive_patient_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of the patient, including vitals, pathology status (current dentition and eruption stages), treatment history, and symptom severity.

example_output.pathology_status: Mixed dentition; severe crowding in mandibular anterior segment.

action_set_definitions.name: assess_dental_development_radiographic
action_set_definitions.description: Analyzes radiographic data (X-rays) to determine root development stages of unerupted permanent teeth and identify dental age.

target_teeth.description: List of teeth to assess (e.g., ['first premolars', 'canines']).

example_output.root_development_status: First premolars at Nolla Stage 7 (1/2 root formed).
example_output.positioning: Canines positioned superior to first premolars.

action_set_definitions.name: perform_dental_extraction
action_set_definitions.description: Executes the surgical removal of specific deciduous or permanent teeth to facilitate the serial extraction sequence.

tooth_identifiers.description: Names or IDs of teeth to extract (e.g., ['deciduous mandibular canines', 'deciduous first molars']).

justification.description: Clinical reasoning for the extraction stage.

action_set_definitions.name: place_orthodontic_appliance
action_set_definitions.description: Installs an appliance to maintain arch integrity or preserve posterior anchorage.

appliance_type.description: The type of orthodontic appliance to be placed.

action_set_definitions.name: evaluate_occlusion_and_soft_tissue
action_set_definitions.description: Checks the vertical overlap of incisors (overbite) and evaluates for potential soft tissue impingement or loss of anchorage.

state_description.patient_vitals: Current physiological measurements of the patient.
state_description.pathology_status: Internal status of specific diseases or conditions.
state_description.treatment_history: List of all actions previously performed on this patient.
state_description.symptom_severity: Subjective or observable symptoms experienced by the patient.
state_description.active_medications: Medications currently circulating in the patient's system and their remaining duration.

pathology_status.organ_function: Mixed dentition; Arch Length Deficiency (ALD): -11.5mm; Nolla Stage P1: 7; IMPA: 97 degrees; Overbite: 55%; Molar Relationship: Class I.

treatment_history: Panoramic radiograph confirms presence of all permanent tooth buds
Lateral cephalometric analysis confirms Class I skeletal pattern
